name: Frosted Maple Gingerbread
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp melted butter or bacon fat
2 cups icing sugar (sifted), up to 3 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking soda, ginger, and salt.
2. Beat the egg until foamy.
3. Gradually beat in the maple syrup, sour cream, and melted butter or bacon fat.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients, beating until well blended.
5. Pour into a greased and lightly floured 11 x 7 x 1 1/2 inches baking pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30-40 minutes, or until cake pulls away from the sides of the pan.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool.
8. Combine all frosting ingredients in a bowl.
9. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth, creamy, and of spreading consistency.
10. Place the icing in big swirls on the cake and sprinkle to taste with chopped walnuts.
